must.expr: ((./workmode='manual' or ./workmode='minimum-percent') and ./speed) or ((./workmode!='manual' and ./workmode!='minimum-percent') and not(./speed))

(../material='l2' or ../material='l3' or ../material='l4') or not(../type='fields' or ../trunk-ecmp='ip' or ../trunk-ecmp='mac')
